title: senecio pinnatus var. simplicifolius
intro: Senecio pinnatus var. simplicifolius is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), commonly known as a type of ragwort. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in modern herbal medicine in various forms, including capsules and extracts.
